input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
input.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.enhanced_question: Show me my equity portfolio with a comprehensive breakdown. Provide a ranked list of holdings including ticker, current price, quantity, market value, and weight percentage. Display daily P&L metrics including total portfolio value, daily change (absolute), and daily change percentage. Provide a sector allocation breakdown showing percentage distribution by category. Include YTD performance with time series data (daily dates and values) from the beginning of the year to today, along with the total YTD return percentage.

data_requirements.requirement: Ranked list of holdings with ticker, current price, quantity, market value, and weight percentage
Total portfolio value, daily P&L absolute value, and daily P&L percentage change
Sector names with corresponding allocation percentages
Time series data (daily dates and portfolio values) from January 1st to today, plus total YTD return percentage

metadata.enhancement_summary: Inferred blocks from user request and added specific metrics (weights, absolute/percentage changes, time series ranges).
metadata.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
